description_long: This bungalow features a modern, minimalist design with a flat roof and clean lines. The exterior combines white and light wood paneling, creating a fresh and contemporary look. Large windows are distributed across the facade, allowing ample natural light into the interior spaces. The front includes a small green lawn with a paved path and an outdoor dining area, while a driveway accommodates a parked car. The layout is single-story, with visible open-plan living, kitchen, and bedroom areas. The overall structure is compact, functional, and designed for comfortable urban living.
description: A modern, single-story bungalow with a flat roof, white and wood-paneled exterior, large windows, a small lawn, and a driveway with a car.
description_view_0: Front view showing the driveway with a car, green lawn, outdoor dining area, and main entrance with large windows.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the lawn, outdoor dining area, and a clear look into the open-plan interior spaces.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back facade with minimal windows and a small plant, emphasizing privacy.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the driveway, car, and a more enclosed section of the bungalow with grouped windows.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large grouped windows on the front and side
